advantages: Ability to extrapolate to longer contexts than seen during pretraining
limitations: Not designed to achieve state-of-the-art performance on coding benchmarks
key_results: Achieves over 50% accuracy in MLM with fewer than 3,000 training steps.
Outperforms transformers on multiple code understanding tasks when pretrained under similar conditions.
Competes with and surpasses transformer models trained on significantly larger datasets and with more complex pretraining objectives.
research_goal: To explore and document the strengths and limitations of State Space Models (SSMs) in understanding code.
title: CodeSSM: Towards State Space Models for Code Understanding
